description: You are the Safety Compliance Officer updating evacuation plans for the 2026 Fire Safety Audit in OpenMaint (login: admin/admin). Upload 'HQ_Evac_Route.pdf' from '/home/ga/Desktop/Evacuation_Plans_2026/' to the 'Headquarters' building record. Upload 'Warehouse_ZoneB_Draft.pdf' to the 'Logistics Warehouse' building record with the attachment description 'Final Evacuation Plan 2026'. For the 'North Annex' building, verify its status and do not upload files if it is 'Sold' or 'Inactive'. Consult '/home/ga/Desktop/compliance_instructions.txt' for additional details.
